ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the employee */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the employee belongs to */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the employee is based in */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* ID of the position the employee holds */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the employee */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the employee */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the employee */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information of the employee */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the employee */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the employee */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL of the employee's photo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who gave the rating */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "rating_score" INTEGER /* Satisfaction rating score (1-5) */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Optional feedback provided by the employee */,
  "rating_category" TEXT /* Category of the rating */,
  "rating_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the rating */,
  "rating_source" TEXT /* Source of the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the employee */,
  "family_size" INTEGER /* Number of family members */,
  "mobile_device" TEXT /* Type of mobile device used by the employee */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnic background of the employee */,
  "highest_education" TEXT /* Highest level of education completed */,
  "language_proficiency" TEXT /* Languages spoken and proficiency levels */,
  "disability_status" TEXT /* Disability status of the employee */,
  "veteran_status" TEXT /* Veteran status of the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experience" (
  "experience_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experience record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "years_of_experience" REAL /* Total years of professional experience */,
  "previous_employer" TEXT /* Name of the previous employer */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title at the previous employer */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Professional certifications held */,
  "skills" TEXT /* Skills of the employee */,
  "achievements" TEXT /* Notable achievements or awards */,
  "training_completed" TEXT /* Training programs completed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experience_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experience_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager of the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the department */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated to the department */,
  "number_of_employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the department */,
  "department_head" TEXT /* Name of the department head */,
  "department_email" TEXT /* Email address of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the region is located */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "average_salary" REAL /* Average salary in the region */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate in the region */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the position */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the position belongs to */,
  "salary_range" TEXT /* Salary range for the position */,
  "required_skills" TEXT /* Required skills for the position */,
  "benefits" TEXT /* Benefits associated with the position */,
  "career_path" TEXT /* Potential career path for the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_positions_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the manager */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the manager manages */,
  "manager_photo_url" TEXT /* URL of the manager's photo */,
  "manager_title" TEXT /* Title of the manager */,
  "manager_description" TEXT /* Description of the manager's role and responsibilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the training program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the training program */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the training program */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the training program */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the training program */,
  "program_cost" REAL /* Cost of the training program */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Name of the instructor */,
  "instructor_email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "certification_issued" TEXT /* Certification issued upon completion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_training" (
  "training_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training program */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date the training was completed */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score achieved in the training */,
  "training_certificate_url" TEXT /* URL of the training certificate */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback on the training program */,
  "recommended_by" TEXT /* Who recommended the training program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_training_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES training_programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_training_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., admin, manager, user) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* More detailed description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the user was granted access */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the last login */,
  "device_id" TEXT /* ID of the device used for the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
